name: biblenote
description: BibleNote Codex plugin with cached OneNote search and local Bible reference parsing.

interface.shortDescription: BibleNote OneNote cache and Bible reference tools
interface.longDescription: Adds MCP tools for syncing OneNote notebooks to a local SQLite FTS cache, searching and reading notes, and using the local BibleNote API for Bible reference parsing.
defaultPrompt: Search my cached OneNote pages about this topic and summarize the best matches.
Sync my OneNote cache and show the status.
